subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Thy letter was received, and We learned of thy lamentations and cries at the severance of news [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق مکتوب واصل شد و بر ناله و فریاد از انقطاع اخبار اطلاع حاصل گشت ولی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
